name: Alerts
description: Customizable stream alerts for subs, gifts, raids, and follows — animated OBS overlay with threshold tiers and an expandable animation library.

overlays.title: Overlay instances
overlays.description: Managed by the Alerts panel — one entry per OBS browser source.

overlay_token.title: Overlay token
overlay_token.description: Auto-managed; used by the OBS overlay URL.

styleOverrides.title: Style CSS overrides
styleOverrides.description: Per-style CSS strings keyed by style ID, edited via the panel code editor.

animOverrides.title: Animation JS overrides
animOverrides.description: Per-animation JS strings keyed by animation ID, edited via the panel code editor.
